items.problem: Flattened YAML key `artifacts: reports: sast:` is syntactically invalid and will fail when copied into `.gitlab-ci.yml`
Package `github.com/google/jsonschema-go` does not exist in the official Go ecosystem; likely a hallucination for `github.com/santhosh-tekuri/jsonschema/v5` or similar
Scenario 3 title claims `Formats()` enumerates sarif "for error messages", but body describes the general supported-formats list output, not specifically the error message path
